_comment: Candidate NEW classes (not the original 8). Exact GLOBE accent strings are from reports/globe_report.json. Trim the 'classes' map to the set you choose, then run: python3 curate.py --bucket qi-ucsd-speech-usw2 --spec <this> --out /mnt/work/curated. Set 'axis' to 'country' (SAA filtered by birthplace country) or 'language' (SAA filtered by native_language).

PH._note: Filipino English. GLOBE 220 spk / 3619 clips (strongest new class by speakers) + SAA.

NZ._note: New Zealand English (native). GLOBE 206 spk / 2895 clips + SAA.

IE._note: Irish English (native). GLOBE 146 spk / 2920 clips + SAA. Note: 'Northern Irish' is a separate GLOBE label with only 7 speakers - NOT included.

DE._note: German-accented English (L2). GLOBE 142 spk / 8488 clips (highest volume new class) + SAA.

HK._note: Hong Kong English (ESL). GLOBE 90 spk / 1096 clips + SAA. Consider whether to keep separate from a China class.

ZA._note: Southern African English (native-ish). GLOBE 68 spk / 1251 clips + SAA.

SCT._note: Scottish English (UK sub-region). GLOBE 135 spk / 2938 clips. Only include if you want intra-UK granularity.
